skill_agent.note: SKILL.md s4.5 hardening-gate description narrower than actual gate coverage (basis for security-6-1)

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: multi-file dispatch/exec/scoring surface with shell, fs, and cache trust boundaries

targetSelection.selectionReason: all code paths that spawn processes, read author-controlled paths/patterns, or persist trusted artifacts consumed by the promotion gate

searchLedger.hypothesis: criteria-grep a.file allows reading outside cwd and the hardening gate does not cover it

searchActions.result: grep/grep_absent join cwdAbs+a.file with no containment; gate at 107-113 only wraps the deterministic exec branch

searchLedger.rationale: hardening gate coverage hole over criteria-driven arbitrary reads

searchLedger.hypothesis: cache hit served without integrity re-validation of the embedded inputHash

searchActions.result: readCachedScore returns parsed blob verbatim; no cached.inputHash===inputHash check; emitted as status:scored

searchLedger.rationale: filename-only integrity binding; forged/stale cache file served as authoritative score

searchLedger.invariant: every executor invocation uses an argv array with no shell

searchActions.result: all paths spawnSync(bin, argsArray) / execFileSync, no shell:true, no string-to-shell concatenation; repoRoot uses fixed git command

searchLedger.rationale: no shell interpolation surface in any dispatch branch
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified argv-array invocation across all five executors

searchLedger.invariant: author-controlled regex source and tested-input length are both bounded

searchActions.result: MAX_PATTERN_LENGTH=512 refuses long patterns; safeRegexTest caps input at 200000 chars

searchLedger.ruledOutReason: pattern-length and input-length caps both enforced

searchLedger.invariant: executors default to read-only mode unless DEEP_AGENT_DISPATCH_WRITE=1

searchActions.result: writeCapableOptIn gates write-capable mode; codex read-only sandbox, claude plan, gemini omits -y, devin auto, opencode no write-grant by default

searchLedger.rationale: F-P1-1 read-only default holds across all executors
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: verified read-only flags on every branch plus cwd-for-all at line 265

title: Criteria-grep arbitrary-file-read traversal is NOT covered by the DEEP_AGENT_ALLOW_CRITERIA_EXEC=0 hardening gate
Score-cache hit path trusts the filename hash and never re-validates the cached blob's own inputHash

reason: all executor invocations use spawnSync/execFileSync argv arrays, no shell:true
F-P1-1 read-only default holds; write gated behind DEEP_AGENT_DISPATCH_WRITE=1
